title: Ultrex Sanitary Pads Ultra Fit 12PK
description: Product Description Ultra sanitary towels are designed to fit perfectly and move with your body providing ultimate security, comfort and discretion. Highly absorbent core that locks the liquid and odours inside the towel for ultimate protection. Directions Unfold the pad, position it in your underwear with the adhesive strip facing out, remove it by grasping the wings, and dispose of it in a trash can after use.
